entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws this surface onto the specified canvas at the specified point using the given sampling options.

params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling or filtering the surface.
params.p: The point at which to draw the top-left corner of the surface.
params.paint: The paint to apply when drawing the surface, or <see langword="null" /> to use default settings.

entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws this surface onto the specified canvas at the specified coordinates using the given sampling options.

params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling or filtering the surface.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the top-left corner.
params.paint: The paint to apply when drawing the surface, or <see langword="null" /> to use default settings.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the top-left corner.
